antipattern.description: Decision based on the vendor's announcement numbers instead of the team's eval.
antipattern.reason: New model's tool-call format breaks 8% of requests in production. Detector: decision record cites public leaderboard, not own eval. Fix: r3-eval-against-own-set.

antipattern.description: New model wired directly into the agent module bypassing the gateway.
antipattern.reason: Per-feature switching cost compounds. Detector: SDK imports outside the gateway file. Fix: r2-gateway-not-direct.

antipattern.description: GO decision results in 100% direct cut-over, no feature flag.
antipattern.reason: Long-tail failures hit all users at once. Detector: rollout_pct == 100 on day 1. Fix: r5-flag-gated-rollout.
